title: Middle Eastern Shakshuka
description: A flavorful and spicy North African-inspired egg dish made with a rich tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced red onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add canned shakshuka, garlicky, quick eastern spices, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Create 4 wells in the tomato mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer skillet to preheated oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
Remove skillet from oven and let cool slightly.
Serve eggs in tomato sauce hot, garnished with parsley or cilantro if desired.
